channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: Reprieve for India as US eases sanctions on buying Russian oil

item.title: Lloyds strives to be ‘UK’s biggest fintech’ by selling more customer data

item.title: Anthropic has ‘no choice’ but to fight Pentagon’s ‘supply-chain risk’ designation in court, CEO says
